characters.description: A returning traveler from Earth, gravity soulcrafter, and ally of House Blacksilver. Now a ruler, he is constructing an exacting soul home while preparing for war and seeking a secure route toward authority.
characters.name: Theo

characters.description: A Tatian staff fighter, ward, and natural-material soulcrafter who travels with Theo and Fiyu. She enters this volume as a ruler burdened by severe damage to her soul home.
characters.name: Nauda

characters.description: An Ichil light soulcrafter, scout, and companion of Theo and Nauda. Her stealth and senses protect the group, but she has postponed a major stage of soulcrafting while she waits for an absent relative.
characters.name: Fiyu

characters.description: An Arbai stone shaper, researcher, and trusted ally. He collaborates closely with Theo and Fiyu on technical work, bringing unusual skill with shaped stone and intricate mechanisms.
characters.name: Navim

characters.description: A House Crimson authority with a coercive interest in Nauda and ambitions entangled with his house's politics. His motives remain difficult to read, making him a dangerous figure even when his aims overlap with hers.
characters.name: Tithes

characters.description: Theo's powerful enemy from an earlier interworld crisis. He is tied to the vault disaster that shaped the companions' present danger, and Theo continues to regard him as a threat requiring much greater strength to confront.
characters.name: Vistul

characters.description: A House Blacksilver recovery specialist who treats Nauda's damaged soul home. His own advancement ended after a failed ascension.
characters.name: House Blacksilver recovery specialist

characters.description: A House of Coin representative who supplies Theo with historical information and offers to serve as a liaison with House Blacksilver. The representative also offers access to merchants dealing in rare plants.
characters.name: House of Coin representative

characters.description: A lavishly funded newcomer to Norro Yorthin who appears to have come from Earth. Theo avoids contact, suspecting that the stranger may be another target or product of the offworld manipulation that endangered earlier travelers.
characters.name: Wraith Darkblade

characters.description: An authority-level traveler from Ichil searching for Fiyu. A disturbing archived message has led him to believe House Blacksilver may be controlling or altering her, though he has not yet been able to reach Norro Yorthin and verify the warning.
characters.name: Fiyu's relative

characters.description: A wounded House Crimson authority who shields Nauda and another authority during the conflict with the Wild Tribes.
characters.name: Wounded House Crimson authority

characters.description: A House Crimson stronghold who rejects an enemy authority's duel, destroys her and much of a mountain, and later breaks a weir key during the wider clash.
characters.name: House Crimson stronghold

characters.description: A merchant-house ruler who joins the Wild Tribes expedition. She fights with paired swords, using one for attack and the other for defense.
characters.name: Merchant-house ruler

characters.description: A humanoid insect archcrafter and regional hive scout who surrenders after an attack on Theo's camp. Retained as the travelers' only local informant, she recognizes the merchant-house ruler as a queen.
characters.name: Surrendered insect scout

characters.description: A Wild Tribes leader stranded on Celeste with a true soul fortress and a growing band of coerced followers. He kills those who resist his rule, gathers materials and recruits, and weighs whether Theo's party is more useful as an ally or a target.
characters.name: Isaac

characters.description: A displaced Sleskin soldier traveling with Theo and Cathina on Celeste. Her colony-trained obedience is rigid, and she helps the outsiders navigate local dangers.
characters.name: Cree-Cree

characters.description: The queen of the powerful Blue-Red-Blue Sleskin colony. With eight ruler-tier guards, a large population, and a new authority-level consort, she is preparing to press her advantage over the rival Grey-Blue-Gold colony.
characters.name: Queen Ayona

characters.description: The queen of the outnumbered Grey-Blue-Gold Sleskin colony. Her missing queen egg is vital to her colony's future, and its recovery is at the center of the covert struggle against Queen Ayona's stronger forces.
characters.name: Queen Yessir

characters.description: An authority who oppresses Nukoko and a future target of Nauda's liberation plans. As her condition worsens on Celeste, she names him while asking Theo to carry on the struggle if she cannot do so herself.
characters.name: Ariano of the Golden Wings

characters.description: A House of Coin ruler traveling with Theo on Celeste. She supports his party while they assess local dangers and competing forces.
characters.name: Cathina
